problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: If Bacteriophage surface display for targeting is applied to formation, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
